info.description: Rules for casting time and components
Links a character to a class and level
Features and resources gained at a specific level
A fully resolved action ready for the engine
A single damage roll component (e.g. 2d6 + 3 slashing)
Stats for weapons, armor, and gear
An item in an inventory or slot
Trackable resources (HP, Spell Slots, Ki Points)
Reusable Action Definitions (Rich Structure - Spell Parity)
Types of damage in the game
Narrative and Game Style settings for the DM AI
Blueprint for World Entities (Creatures, Flora, Minerals)
Instance of an entity in a game room
Log of persistent game actions (Attack, Spell, Move)
Unified item model (Equipment, Magic Items, Loot, Tools)
A chunk of knowledge derived from a source.
A source of knowledge, usually a markdown file.
Snapshot of game state at a specific point in time
A discrete cycle of gameplay history
Concurrency control handling for Room turns
Persistent delta storage for terrain modifications
